response.justification: Solid senior full-stack engineer with ~16 years of broad experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, plus some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the role is a Director-level Principal IC focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, cloud-scale strategic influence, and advisory work with strategic customers — none of which are evident. The resume reflects strong craftsmanship and hands-on engineering, not principal-level AI thought leadership or platform-building.
strengths: ~16 years of polyglot engineering across web, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Track record of community leadership: talks, workshops, open-source platform (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized expertise in AI
Lacks Principal/Director-level scope — no evidence of cross-org strategy, advising strategic customers, or shaping cloud product direction
Limited deep cloud-platform expertise (some AWS CDK exposure, but not at strategic/architectural scale)

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and AI products
No Principal/Director-level strategic IC track record
